regex.title: Obfuscated exec via base64
regex.detail: Executes base64-decoded content at runtime — common obfuscation technique

regex.title: Obfuscated eval via zlib
regex.detail: Compressed + encoded payload executed at runtime

regex.title: Hex-encoded execution
regex.detail: Executes hex-encoded string — used to evade static analysis

regex.title: Reads SSH private keys
regex.detail: Opens files in ~/.ssh — potential credential theft

regex.title: Possible env-var exfiltration
regex.detail: POSTs data including environment variables to a remote endpoint

regex.title: Modifies shell profile
regex.detail: Appends to shell startup file — persistence mechanism

regex.title: Systemd unit file creation
regex.detail: Creates a systemd service — persistence mechanism

regex.title: Dynamic import via __import__
regex.detail: Dynamic imports can obscure what modules are loaded

regex.title: Hardcoded IP address in URL
regex.detail: Network requests to raw IPs bypass DNS and are harder to audit

regex.title: Possible keylogger
regex.detail: Uses keyboard input monitoring APIs associated with keyloggers
